_publications._publicationTitle: PERADIGM: Phenotype embedding similarity-based rare disease gene mapping.

_contextSnippet: However, SKAT-O failed to detect IFT140 as significant (raw p-value: 0.00146, adjusted p-value: 0.58, rank: 46), likely due to the small number of IFT140 rare LoF variant carriers
details: Successfully detected IFT140 association with ADPKD (raw p-value: 2.44 × 10^-6) while SKAT-O failed (raw p-value: 0.00146, adjusted p-value: 0.58, rank: 46)
